items.title: MLE decision flow
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  data["observed data x1..xn"] --> model["parametric model P(x|theta)"]
  model --> likelihood["L(theta) = product P(xi|theta)"]
  likelihood --> logform["ell(theta) = sum log P(xi|theta)"]
  logform --> argmax["theta_hat = argmax ell(theta)"]
  argmax --> closed{"closed form?"}
  closed -->|yes| solve["set grad ell = 0"]
  closed -->|no| optim["minimize negative ell via GD"]
  solve --> estimate["theta_hat_MLE"]
  optim --> estimate
items.caption: MLE pipeline: write the likelihood, switch to log-likelihood, then solve ∇ℓ = 0 or optimize −ℓ numerically.

items.title: Likelihood peak at MLE
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  low["theta far from data"] --> curve["log-likelihood curve"]
  peak["theta_hat at peak"] --> curve
  curve --> high["ell(theta) highest at theta_hat"]
items.caption: θ̂_MLE sits at the parameter value where the model assigns maximum density/probability to the observed data.
